message:
🐛 fix: resolve nightly test regressions (card-registry, consistency, unit) (#2852)

card-registry-integrity-test: Add safeLazy() support to the AST parser
and fix re-export alias tracing (export { Bar as Foo } from './Bar'
was looking for the alias in the target file instead of the original name).

consistency-test: Add AbortSignal.timeout to authFetch() so it passes
the Phase 5 fetch-without-signal check.

unit-test: Align test expectations with current production behavior:
- useCachedData: fetchers now throw when no data source is available
  (preserves cached data) instead of returning empty arrays
- mcp/config: hooks silently swallow errors for optional resources
  instead of falling back to demo data
- missions/types: validateMissionExport now defaults missing optional
  fields (version, description, type, tags, step content) instead of
  rejecting them

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -526,5 +526,8 @@ export function authFetch(input: RequestInfo | URL, init?: RequestInit): Promise
     headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`)
   }
 
-  return fetch(input, { ...init, headers })
+  // Use caller-provided signal if present, otherwise apply default timeout
+  const signal = init?.signal ?? AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS)
+
+  return fetch(input, { ...init, headers, signal })
 }
